English Practice Area

Canonical agent guide: ./AGENTS.md
Long digest: ./llms-full.txt
Architecture: ./docs/architecture.md
Contracts: ./docs/practice-contracts.md
Codebase map: ./docs/codebase-map.md
Auth/deploy: ./docs/auth-and-deploy.md
Examples: ./docs/examples/README.md
Visual system: ./design.md

Key facts:
- Topic-centric English learning system
- One shared practice engine across builders
- Auth.js + Drizzle + Postgres + Next.js 16
- Grounded feedback preferred over speculative fallback
- Profile owns progress and learning map surfaces
